globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests
globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), serial=(), bluetooth=()
